questions.didItPass: Yes. The conveyor loaded the manifest, materialized the planned outputs, hashed them, and emitted receipts.
questions.howDoIUseIt: Run story plan with a story and slice, then run story implement with the same slice and --target-kind build-setup.
questions.whatDidYouBuild: A reusable Build Setup template and a CLI proof lane that materializes Business Analysis, Build Setup, Test Results, Review Package, and acceptance evidence for a story run.
questions.whatEvidenceProvesIt: The Review Package references the source story, Build Setup, Test Results, hashes, and receipt paths.
questions.whatIsStillBlocked: Live cognitive BA/provider execution for arbitrary stories is not claimed by this template proof; that belongs to the conveyor-worker runtime lane.
questions.whyDidYouBuildIt: To replace internal conveyor terminology with a normal product delivery pipeline and prove the run can be reviewed without manual assembly.
